title: YMDK ANSI ISO PBT Doubleshot Shine Through Pudding Keycaps Suitable for MX Mechanical Keyboard Corsair Razer SF KBD75 Tada68 DZ60 (Black Pudding Full Set)(Only Keycap)

reviews.title: Looks great, shows off my RGB light on my Keychron  K4 now.
reviews.text:
[[VIDEOID:2f9f1dbaca0dc20e2ddfad733f0e051c]] Looks great, shows off my RGB lights on my Keychron K4 now. The only downside is not having the function icons on the keys anymore. I’ll have to work on getting some little stickers.
Edit:Added a Movie Clip

reviews.title: Great but some keys may not be suitable for your keyboard
reviews.text: they look really pretty tbh. However some keys had fitment issues. The spacebar had their slots just a little bit off so it couldnt fit. The caps lock is upside down. The windows and menu keys did not like being next to other keys. Other than that, the rest of the keys fit great.

reviews.title: They work great
reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:eaa9e5229cc02ed31da7ef98d0a78ee4]] Replaced the most of my bottom row on my keyboard with these key caps.  They are good, the LED shines through and it really nice! for Corsair keyboards.

reviews.title: Quality can be improved but overall great price and compatibility
reviews.text: One of the few sets that actually fit my K95 (Corsair bottom row) Plenty of extra pieces for other keyboards too. The color black of these pieces appear much more grey compared to he caps my keyboard came with. And each piece has a little dimple at the top where they were cast or molded. Not the end of the world, but other sets don't have that. Also found small imperfections in several pieces. Time will tell how they do over prolonged use. Pretty good for the price, solid 4 of 5.

reviews.title: Just what I needed
reviews.text: I wanted some keycaps to match the theme of my keyboard but it's a struggle finding keycaps that fit the sizing of R1 on a Corsair keyboard. This is exactly what I needed!

title: 66 Pieces Gateron Yellow Switches for Mechanical Keyboards,3-pin KS-9 Supporting SMD RGB Light | Linear | 50g Force
description:
Specifications：
Gateron Red Switch（Office）---Linear---Bottom out distances4±0.4mm---Actuation distances2.0±0.6mm---Actuation force45±15gf---Bottom out force60±15gfGateron Brown Switch（Universal axis）---Tactilre&Clicky---Bottom out distances4±0.4mm---Actuation distances2.0±0.6mm---Actuation force55±15gf---Bottom out force70±15gfGateron Blue Switch（Typing artifact）---Tactilre&Clicky---Bottom out distances4±0.4mm---Actuation distances2.3±0.6mm---Actuation force60±15gf---Bottom out force70±15gfGateron Yellow Switch（Smooth）---Linear---Bottom out distances4±0.4mm---Actuation distances2.0±0.6mm---Actuation force50±15gf---Bottom out force65±15gfGateron Black Switch（Game）---Linear---Bottom out distances4±0.4mm---Actuation distances2.0±0.6mm---Actuation force60±15gf---Bottom out force75±15gfGateron White Switch（Light）---Linear---Bottom out distances4±0.4mm---Actuation distances2.0±0.6mm---Actuation force35±15gf---Bottom out force50±15gfGateron Green Switch（Potent）---Tactilre&Clicky---Bottom out distances4±0.4mm---Actuation distances2.3±0.6mm---Actuation force70±15gf---Bottom out force80±15gf
Note：
During the delivery process, the pins of the switch may touch and bend. This is inevitable. Bent pins can be straightened with nail clippers, which will not affect normal use.
features: Switches Compatibility：Gateron KS-9 RGB Mechanical MX Type Key Switch-Clear top，Supports two-pin 3mm round lights, four-pin RGB lights and patch RGB lights.Compatible with Cherry MX switch, suitable for most mechanical keyboards.
Main Parameters：Gateron Yellow Switch---Linear feel (straight up and down), Actuation force is about 50±15gf.Over 50 million laboratory tests ensure durability and more stable and reliable quality.

Suitable For：Gateron Yellow Switch---The yellow switch feels smooth, rebounds faster, and feels stronger when pressed. You can feel it making the keycap follow your fingers more closely. The yellow switch is our recommended switch for those who feel that the red switch is too light, too soft, and needs a little stronger feedback.
Installation Type:Plate mounted switches (3 pins)
Package Included：1 puller tool and 66 Yellow Switches ‘+’ shape and PP protection box.

reviews.title: Almost perfect :)
reviews.text: A few had slightly bent pins,  but safely fixed with tweezers. Crisp clicking on the Blues. Would recommend if asked.

reviews.title: Great set
reviews.text: Bought these for a budget build, my set was perfect. Quality exceeded expectations.

reviews.title: Spectacular!
reviews.text:
all i have to say is, get these keycaps. i was truly surprised at the quality of these keycaps. they feel really nice, solid, and with a little grain on the top that are very comfortable. Pricewise i think these are right on. At about $50 the quality is really good without the wait and the much higher prices of some other premium ABS...the colorway is one that i really like. I have always had a handful of colorways i wanted, the botonical, these Hammerhead, modern dolch, etc. the legends are pretty consistent with a few fonts thinner than others but i count 2 keys in my 60% board. not bad and i don't really notice it. i really like the color scheme more than i would notice the font issues.

Now i only wish i would have have a bigger board, 75% or TKL to take advantage of the other keys. geez keyboard world you will bankrupt me.

Very beautiful set. i'm coming back to my 60% for a little while.

reviews.title: Lovely colors, plenty of options!
reviews.text: Key caps look really great. Tons of combinations of caps for just about every layout. I threw it on an old WYSE WY-60 keyboard and it had some uncommon unit sizes for a few keys. Worked out great after finding keycaps that fit its spot. I had to grind down the edges of a few keys to fit them nicely. A modern keyboard will have no compatibility issues without a doubt!

reviews.title: Perfect
reviews.text: Although it was pricey I loved the color scheme and wanted it. It has extra bits like longer or shorter space bar and ctrl, alt keys in case your board needs them.

reviews.title: Quality keycaps
reviews.text:
Well built and produced keycaps. This keyboard includes keys for Aifei, not sure if they are the ones who made these keycaps or the ones they are cloning.

Very nice and bright colors, font looks great.

Though this set seems to have a bit of lower profile and standard keycaps. So just a heads up on that.

Overall I am happy with these Keycaps.

title: Metal Switch Opener GPL 205G0 0.35oz, Lubrication Oil Mechanical Keyboard Keycaps Aluminum Alloy Opener Instantly for Cherry mx Switches
description: As an indispensable tool for custom players, I think you will often use the switch opener, which can be placed on your workbench. Then this ultra-high-value and super-feeling opener will be your best choice, it can open any cherry switch, and the switch body similar to the cherry switch structure. It can turn on the switch in one second without any lag. We have tested and improved it several times. Compared with other switch openers, it has more personality, adds more surprising details, and is more smooth to use. This set includes a switch opener, as 4 Prong tool and a lubed brush. Compared to holding the switch by hand, I believe that the 4 Prong tool is a better choice for you. It can make your work process more professional and faster. The lubed Brush is slender and precise, and it can find exactly where you need lubrication. Product packaging:A Metal Switch Opener A 4 Stem Holder  A Lube Brush A GPL 205G0
features: 【GPL 205G0】It is enough to lubricate 300 switches. 205 grease can be used on satellite and balance bar.
【Switch Opener】This keyboard switch opener is made of aluminum alloy material, using anodizing process, matte texture, and never fading.
【Convenient】 It includes complete set of accessories, you can have all tools at one time.This is a perfect accessory set for those who like to mod their switches.
【Package Includes】1 pcs GPL 205G0, 1 pcs Metal Switch Opener, 1 pcs Stem Holder, 2 pcs Lube brushes.
【Warm Tips】This switch opener can only be used for cherry switch, temporarily not suitable for other switches.

reviews.title: Gamer kid loves this!
reviews.text: Bought as a gift for my gamer teen, and they love it! The kids are all into the clickity clack of keyboard sounds, and hers is so great now that her friends are asking her to clean and lube their keyboards and paying her to do it! Awesome product!

reviews.title: Almost everything you'll need to start fixing your keyboard.
reviews.text:
I was able to use this to make a 'cheap' Corsair board sound like a $300 board. The only other thing that would have made this a perfect kit is maybe a switch puller?

Definitely worth the price and the seller was quick to replace my missing items.

reviews.title: These keycaps feel and look awesome (for the price)
reviews.text:
I bought these keycaps for a cheap mechanical keyboard I had lying around. I had put some cheap keycaps of a similar price but a different brand on them earlier this year. Didn't like those keycaps at all.

These keycaps have a more pleasant texture, not smooth but not quite as grainy. I love love love the greyscale color scheme, and the blank keycaps are really aesthetically pleasing. Obviously, if you can't type without looking at your keyboard you should purchase the keycaps that come with all the lettering, it probably won't take away much from your experience.

One small note, I would suggest caution when using the included keycap puller. It scratched the side of my spacebar and left a little black line. Unfortunately, it is on the side of the keyboard that faces me, so now every time I sit down to type I will see the little black scratch. So be careful when pulling these off. Otherwise, I love these colors and will definitely consider buying other products from this brand based on this level of quality for price.

I forgot to mention. I loved the packaging on these keycaps!! The other brand I bought from had the keycaps all together in a ziplock bag. This brand had the keycaps arranged in order in sleeves and it was so much better for putting the keycaps on! ok that's all.

title: Hyekit Custom Gaming Keyboard - Alice Layout 66 Keys - Support QMK/Via Programmable Key - Gasket Structure - USB C Wired Mechanical Keyboard Kit - RGB Hot Swappable Switches & Keycaps - Acrylic Shell
description:
Note:
This link only sells a kit, not a finished keyboard, you need to assemble it yourself, the kit does not include switches, keycaps, data cables, or stabilizers.
About This Item
1.FancyAlice66 keyboard kit Alice is equipped with 66 keys, ergonomic, yes typing is more comfortable.  2. Hot-swappable PCB uses Kailh hot-swappable socket and supports 3-pin and 5-pin mechanical switches.  3. 32U4 chip master, support QMK/VIA, kit supports QMK/VIA, more customized, you can use it to modify key functions and customize more functions.  4. South-facing RGB Backlit has 66 lamp beads + 16 bottom lamps, 16 million color RGB backlight makes the keyboard look more attractive.  5.Gasket Mount, equipped with Pom material positioning plate, poron sandwich surface, and poron pad, which makes the keyboard more comfortable and soft to type, and the typing sound is more pleasant.  6. Acrylic stacking shell, the texture is very good, enjoy the fun of custom assembling the shell.  7. Wired mode, support USB-C, typing response is faster, Type-c interface adapts to more data lines.  8. The kit needs to be assembled by yourself. First, ensure that you have a certain ability to assemble. You can refer to our assembly instruction video for assembly.  9.Support PCB Mounted and Plate Mounted stabilizers, we recommend you to use PCB Mounted stabilizers.
Package includes:
Keyboard case*1  PCB*1  Quiet sandwich cotton*1  Switch pad*1  Assemble some parts
features: 【Package Included】Keyboard case*1, PCB*1, Quiet sandwich cotton*1, Switch pad*1, Assemble some parts. No USB cables, switches, stabilizer, and keycaps. (Note, The kit needs to be assembled by yourself. you ensure that you have a certain ability to assemble. You can refer to our assembly instruction video for assembly. Let's enjoy the process of assembling the keyboard and the great sense of achievement brought by the successful assembly.)

【Custom Gaming Keyboard】Hot-swappable PCB uses Kailh hot-swappable socket and supports 3-pin and 5-pin mechanical switches. Support PCB Mounted and Plate Mounted stabilizers, we recommend you to use PCB Mounted stabilizers. 32U4 chip master, support QMK/VIA, more customized, you can use it to modify key functions and customize more functions. Wired mode, supports USB-C, typing response is faster.

【Alice Layout】The Alice layout considers the natural input angle of the wrist from the perspective of ergonomics. When using the conventional arrangement keyboard for continuous high-intensity input work, the unnatural bending of the wrist will easily lead to hand fatigue, and the Alice layout can solve this problem very well, it takes into account the integrity of the keyboard and the relatively relaxed input state of the wrist.

【South-facing RGB Backlit】Alice66 has 66 lamp beads + 16 bottom lamps, 16 million color RGB backlight, the RBG Backlight effect is very bright even in the daytime. The lower lamp position is designed so that the light will not be blocked by the switch. The fully transparent bottom cover allows the 16 bottom lights to display their backlight effects without obstruction, making the keyboard look more attractive.

【Acrylic Gasket Structure】Alice66 is designed with Gasket structure, equipped with Pom material positioning plate, poron sandwich surface, and poron pad, the sound is pure, and the feel is soft. This wonderful feel can make the typing process very pleasant and full of fun.

reviews.title: Sounds great with no mods
reviews.text:
[[VIDEOID:58cc2520e806ff1428542a1df7456920]] Assembly was pretty easy for this DIY kit. It even sounds great without any modifications. I decided to put poron switch pads on the pcb since the foam it came with did not line up properly. The feet that comes with this kit is too aggressive for my liking. I decided to remove it and put clear rubber bumpons

Did not come with stabilizers. I was hoping it does at this price point. Speaking of which, this kit can be had for cheaper on other retailers. But ordering from Amazon gave me more confidence.

My copy came with cracked and scuffed case. I messaged the seller directly and they were able to help and send me a new case promptly. They also helped with VIA setup on this keyboard.

Pros:
- easy assembly
- VIA support PCB
- great sound with little to no modifications
- south facing, per key RGB
- under glow lighting
- A+ great customer support from seller

Cons:
- price seems higher compared to other websites
- inconsistent craftsmanship
- no stabilizers included
- front of the keyboard can be wobbly with the aggressive feet riser installed

(Keycaps: MT3 2048; Switches: WS Aurora Clears)

title: SteelSeries Apex Pro Mini Mechanical Gaming Keyboard – World’s Fastest Keyboard – Adjustable Actuation – Compact 60% Form Factor – RGB – PBT Keycaps – USB-C
description: The Apex Pro Mini Wireless brings the world's fastest keystrokes with OmniPoint 2.0, total adjustability of activation points, dual actuation, and a slim-form factor.
features: World's Fastest Keyboard - Overtake standard mechanical keyboards as OmniPoint 2.0 delivers 11x faster response and 10x swifter actuation.
Customize Every Keystroke - Precisely adjust the registration depth of every key to the nearest 0.1MM, going from speedy 0.2MM touches to deliberate 3.8MM presses.
2-in-1 Action Keys - Program two different actions for the same key, such as walking with a light touch and sprinting with a deeper press.
60% Form Factor - Streamlined design saves desk space and leaves more room for mouse movement, retaining full-size keyboard capabilities with side-printed functions.

Durable PBT Keycaps - Long-lasting double shot PBT keycaps provide a high-quality texture for enhanced keystroke feel and improved typing accuracy. Compatibility-OS-Windows, Xbox, PlayStation, and Mac OS X. USB port required(*Not all software features supported on Mac OS). Software-SteelSeries Engine for Windows (8.1 or newer) and Mac OSX (10.13 or newer) (*Not all software features supported on Mac OS)

reviews.title: Almost perfect, if not for the competition
reviews.text:
TLDR: If you don't want to deal with pre-ordering the Wooting60HE or just really like Steelseries products, this is a really good 60% option.

Pros:
-Omnipoint switches feel very good
-Adjustable actuation point
-Finally adopted PBT keycaps for longevity
-Good RGB brightness and accuracy
-Pretty good stabs out of the box made better with some lube

Cons:
-The Wooting60HE exists...

Thoughts:
Rant time. Right out of the gate, this would be the perfect 60% keyboard currently, if the Wooting60HE didn't exist. It has hotswap switches, acoustic foam, analog functionality, adjustable actuation point, RAPID TRIGGER (huge for high actuation point users), pre-lubed switches and stabs, and doesn't require its software to be active to function fully. This board isn't bad by any means, it's just that the wooting is just better in my opinion. I saw steelseries' video today comparing their "response time" with some weird rigged comparison test where they claim a 10ms advantage over the wooting. Even if that were true, which I don't think is accurate, 10ms isn't enough to justify choosing this over the wooting, unless you just really like Steelseries products, which is fine. But the rapid trigger functionality alone is HUGE for switches with a high actuation. If you don't know what that is, basically at any point during the upward travel (after you've pressed a key), you can press down again, to register another keypress. It basically makes the actuation dynamic letting you keep that high actuation, but not require you to fully release the key to press it again. Anyway, rant/PSA over, back to the Apex.

Despite everything I just said, this is still a really good keyboard. If you liked the Apex Pro/TKL, you'll like this. I've found that magnetic switches are easily the smoothest ones on the market, even without lubing. They just glide, absolutely fantastic.

I would comment on the responsiveness, but honestly, I really can't imagine milliseconds making a huge difference for movement inputs in a shooter. Osu probably if that's your thing, but starting to move in one direction or another a milisecond faster isn't going to change your game in the slightest. A mouse, absolutely, but there's really no keyboard input that needs that level of precision. So try not to get hung up on responsiveness in regards to keyboard claims.

Something definitely worth noting is how magnetic switches and optical switches are basically immune to double presses that eventually happen to regular mechanical switches. You can rest assure that all of your key presses will be very accurate.

Conclusion:
Before you commit to this, I highly recommend looking into the Wooting60HE. If you don't want to deal with pre-ordering, or just really like Steelseries products, this is still a really good keyboard. I love the switches, and am so happy they decided to finally start using PBT keycaps.

reviews.title: Great keyboard
reviews.text: I don’t know why people are hating on this keyboard so much? unless you’re like a nerd and actually care about the .2mm and stuff about the price. The keys so really nice and smooth and is a very quiet keyboard, if you want to drop this much for a keyboard then go for it i think it was a good purchase for me

reviews.title: Perfect for Gaming
reviews.text: 15 year old gamer approved! It allows for quicker response times in games, lights are bright and stay on. The keys are a little noisy but if you’re into ASMR, it’s relaxing!

reviews.title: Takes some getting used to.
reviews.text: This mini keyboard was a major change from my previous keyboard. The first major shock I had when I needed the grave/tilde key for programming, thankfully with the SteelSeries GG program I was able to program the grave/tilde key into the escape key with a modifier. In Minecraft as well some of the F3 functions needed to be mapped because there is no function row. After some getting used to I am just as fast on this keyboard as my previous one. There was a quirk I could not figure out without some googling however, if you hold the SteelSeries logo and the windows button it locks the windows button and changes it's color to white. Doing it again will re-enable the windows button.

reviews.title: Space bar was too big:( still cute tho
reviews.text: The keys are so cute! I love it! The only downside was that the space bar was too big for my keyboard!! It was also too big on my brothers keyboard, so that’s a little weird. So sad about it too since that was the main reason why I got it:(

reviews.title: Really cheap look and feel
reviews.text:
These are really cheap. I know you might be thinking, you get what you pay for and these are cheaply priced. However, at the end of the day, keycaps are just plastic and the good ones are just waaay over priced.

First thing first, the actual color differs from the picture. The picture has a nice looking matcha green, the actual product is a little darker green and no where as vibrant. Also, some of the legends on the keycaps are kind of blurry. I am noticing the blurriness on all the non-alpha caps. You can tell these are really cheap and they look pretty bad.

features: Nylon Top and bottom housing, POM silent tactile stem
Double stage spring: 63.5g

reviews.title: Can be used stock!
reviews.text:
[[VIDEOID:528307786b36a4c2c9833ddd389101cb]] They come with a small amount of lube pre applied. Usually, prelubed switches are inconsistent in my experience but these ones are really good. I decided to not lube them at all. EDIT: got a few more batches, they're not as consistent. But seller was nice enough to get them replaced.

The stems are long pole. As a result, it has a nice bottom out sound.

It was noticeably heavier coming from a 50g switch to these that are 63g, but overtime I got adjusted and had no problems typing with them.

Overall a great buy, though I wish it was priced more competitively.

Using on Drop Preonic with MT3 Camillo, plateless, tape mod

reviews.title: Nice linears
reviews.text:
Starting off not sure who's at fault for this as it's only fulfilled by Amazon but one of my bags was missing a few switches (one bag was open and all the switches were rattling around inside the amazon pouch it arrived in) I counted 5 missing and there wasn't a silica gel packet either, the other bags were fine.
complaint aside they feel really nice and the factory lube seems to be well done as wish they had a "3 pin" option and different switch amounts 35 2 is too few and 3 is too many (unless some get lost in transit like mine lol) 90 would be a good option for the TKL/75% gang

reviews.title: Will be Using Right Away
reviews.text: In building & repairing computers these key switches are used very often. Mainly for high-end (over $100) keyboards that the serious gamers use. What they do is tough on the keyboards and often switches break or become less responsive which may lead to a gamer losing a match. These snap right in to the sockets and can instantly rebuild the whole keyboard like new. I realize they would not be used by your everyday person or casual gamer but when it gets serious they are  the switches to be used.

reviews.title: Nice Linear
reviews.text: These are nice and smooth and sound wonderful.  I'm not a linear fan usually, but I do like them in my modifier keys (shift, backspace, enter, and space) because I don't like the return sound a tactile makes while in a larger key.  These are perfect for that as they don't have a high pitch and there's no spring ping to even think of!  I would highly recommend them to anyone looking for a lighter-weight linear switch with some style.

reviews.title: Great Stock!
reviews.text: The switches sounds great and feels good to use. The lube in this is not bad at all and you don't hear any ping or scratchiness. The bottom out is much more than I am used to, but I do enjoy it otherwise.

title: PWNAGE Ultra Custom Gaming Keyboard - Full Size RGB - USB C Mechanical Keyboard Hot Swappable Switches & PBT Keycaps - Black Metal Top Plate - Linear Red Switches
features: Full Size Ultrafast Optical Mechanical Switches
Over 115,168,768 possible colorway and switch combination options
Hot Swappable PBT Keycaps
Hot Swappable Gateron Optical Switches
Dampening Foam

reviews.title: Nice manual keyboard with a lighter touch.
reviews.text:
This review is for the Pwnage Ultra Custom Mechanical Keyboard: Gateron Optical Switches.

The Package was delivered quickly in perfect condition. In the box was the full-size white keyboard, detachable USB cord, keycap remover, and manual.

Setup was plug and play, no additional drivers needed for Windows 11. The keyboard replaced my 105 key Cherry Blue switch manual black keyboard... which has worked very well with just basic cleaning for 5 years. Compared to my old keyboard this keyboard adds multi color, and some very intense graphics, should you choose to use them... I see videos already posted for this product cycling thru the graphics available so I will just show pictures of the static color I have chosen.

The Red Optical/Manual switches on this keyboard are a little quieter than the blue cherry switches I am used to – but they are by no means quiet…it definitely has the tap, tap, tap sound inherent in all manual keyboards The press seems very easy... much lighter and easier than the blue manual switches I am used to. And so far, I think I prefer the red optical/manual switches on this keyboard. Of course, typing is very subjective to taste and your mileage may vary.

Overall, I can honestly say that I approve of this keyboard, and will keep this one as my everyday keyboard, unless, of course my wife steals it for her home office workstation… she has after all been eyeballing it.

reviews.title: Overall an excellent full size keyboard
reviews.text:
Unboxing was fun. Nicely packaged. Keyboard is nice and large, a little too large for my tastes coming from someone who uses a 65%. But good for every day use and office use with a little side of gaming in the evening. Switches are nice and the RGb effects are plentiful. I think being able to switch the plates easily for those who want a quick easy solution to being able to completely change their keyboard without having to spend the time and money to build a completely custom one one.

Definitely a great full size.

reviews.title: Gaming all the way, I could not use this for extended typing... loudness lol
reviews.text:
This keyboard is very well made, has good heft and stability to it. The keyboard includes a braded USB-C and a key cap remover tool. The keys feel really good when gaming, the input is instantaneous and the feel and travel is really smooth. The only downside for me it is that it is very loud. I use this when my wife is around and she is immediately annoyed, lol, so I only use it when I game on my own. That being said, this is my favorite keyboard. I love all the RGB patterns, (check video). I love the feel of the keys, when I game I feel that is just the right travel distance and feel for my taste. The rear pop out legs help me put this bad boy at the right angle. The finish is really even and dark, the keys are not your typical white on black, it is more of a clear or light grey, this makes the contrast a little harder to see what key is what, so if you don't type well and need to reference the keyboard visually it might be a harder to see. All in all this is a very good entry level keyboard and it is very budget friendly.

+ RGB Great patterns
+ Hefty and stable
+ Silky smooth keys
+ USB-C braded cable
+ Mac / Win compatible
+ Black finish is matte and clean
- Loud Keys

Hope this was helpful!

reviews.title: Beautiful Keyboard
reviews.text:
I was first impressed with this keyboard by the packaging. The flap that secures the box top it held closed by magnets. Unique and impressive.

As to the keyboard, it is beautifully white and has top-of-the-line red key actuators. With these you get a definite "click" when you hit the keys informing you the character has been chosen. The keytops supplied are also all white and they supply a keytop pulling tool, obviously expecting you to switch out some of the keytops to suit your taste, making this superior quality unit fully customized to your taste.

A premium keyboard for those who appreciate true quality in a computer input instrument.

reviews.title: Great and beautiful keyboard
reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:784296779c5343262f2f9394390eabd8]] First of all, the packaging box of this keyboard caught my eye. The box was attracted by magnets, which is novelty for me. The keyboard is beautiful, I like the white keyboard because it looks very clean, and there are many kinds of RGB lights, which means that we have many options. It is very comfortable to press the keys and has a good sense of hitting. Meanwhile, the keyboard is a little louder for me. I don't feel it when I play games, but I feel a little noisy when I work, and I'm afraid it will disturb my roommates because our desktops are in the same room, but the sound is within the acceptable range. Overall, I am satisfied with this beautiful and useful keyboard.

title: ASCENY Coiled & Double-Sleeved Mechanical Keyboard Cable, for Type-C Mechanical Keyboards (Purple)
description: As MK enthusiasts who are obsessed with building keyboards, we understood the needs of the mechanical keyboards community. This cable is our latest take on designed mechanical keyboard cables. Our goal was to create a mass production product that will allow more people to get into the hobby without having to spend a huge amount of money. After many failed attempts to make a great coil in mass production, we finally believe that we have created a great product that stands in one with the standards of mechanical keyboard enthusiasts.
features: Stiff plastic injected Asceny connectors. No more amateurish heatshrinks.
PET double sleeve that gives a beautiful texture, and extra durability.
4.9ft long (excluding the coil length) & Super flexible 6" tight coil that lasts.
Comes in a beautiful package that holds the coil tight. Can be saved and re-used whenever you want to store your cable.

reviews.title: Great cable for a small investment.
reviews.text:
Being new to to the Mechanical Keyboard market, I recently purchased a prebuilt "budget" board that came with a long plain usb-c cable, which would be fine but I wanted a cleaner look for my desk. Aviator cables are great but I did not want to invest $50+ for a single use cable. In comes Asceny with a cable that costs half as much and looks just as good in my opinion. The packaging was nicely made, and does not feel cheap in any way, this company really put a lot of love into the product.

My only complaint is that with the direction of the coil, I can not have the Asceny logo facing up with a left side charge port on my keyboard, otherwise the cable does not sit correctly on the desk. This would not dissuade me from recommending it though, and may even encourage some buyers.

reviews.title: Keychron K4 Compatible
reviews.text:
Read reviews about the plug not fitting on some Keychrons but was prepared to modify. Turns out, it fits just fine, and I haven’t had any issues so far.
Cable itself feels solid and durable, a bit stiff, but maneuverable.
Overall, for the price, I’d say go with it if you are debating.

reviews.title: Nice
reviews.text: Good value, sturdy, nice style

reviews.title: Good starter coil cable for keyboard build
reviews.text: This is my first coil keyboard cable for my first mechanical keyboard build. I can’t compare it to one of the more popular brands like Glorious for example, but for what it is, it’s a nice, sturdy, well made cable. It looks good and is a nice accessory for my keyboard. The coils are actually smaller than I thought they would be, but still nice. I wish the cable was longer though, that’s my only complaint.

reviews.title: good wire to save space and for the *aesthetic*
reviews.text: i love how the coiled-wire pairs with the mechanical keyboard. it makes my desk look less messy and looks fab LOL

title: ikbc W200 Wireless Mechanical Keyboard with Cherry MX Red Switch for Windows and Mac OS, Enables Media Key and LED Indicator (2.4G Dongle, USB 2.0, PBT Double Shot 87 Keycaps, Black Color, ANSI/US)
features: ▼ Mechanical keyboard with Cherry MX Red Switches (Linear): A linear, lighter but does not have tactile bump and audible click found comparing with Cherry MX Blue switches. Cherry MX Red is ideal for gaming where the low articulation force and linear path allow for quick successive key presses. Typing with Cherry MX Red switches is similar to browns, though it does lack tactile feedback and It is always the best preference for gamers.
▼ A durable computer keyboard with PBT Double Shot keycaps for Ergonomic Keycap Shapes designed to provide you with durable, long lasting and comfortable typing experience.

▼ Plug-And-Play Simplicity. : Setup takes seconds—you simply plug the wireless receiver into a USB port and start using your keyboard right away without software. 100% Anti-ghosting with 6-key Rollover and convenient FN Multimedia Shortcuts Keys.

▼ Other Features : Original Cherry MX Switch-Each Reliable Switches Rated for 50 million Typing Times. Using 2.4Ghz Wireless can Connectivity-Up to 6 Month Long Standby Time. Product structure include the Smart Power Indicator Light and 2 Adjustable Feetstand Height.
▼ What You Can Get: iKBC Cherry MX Red switch mechanical keyboard x1, 2.4G wireless dongle x1 (equipped inside battery area), AAA batteries x2, dust cover x1, key puller x1, user manual x1.

reviews.title: Great
reviews.text:
It meets all my needs. I got it to replace a wireless Velocifire keyboard whose internal battery was dying. I had to plug my old one in everyday as I couldn’t see the key labels without the backlight, and it’s built in battery life decreased from 5 to 1 days over a couple years. So it was essentially wired, while I prefer the wireless aesthetic.

This one avoids the backlight killing the battery life as well as internal battery degradation. I can see the key labels fine without a backlight, and it takes replaceable batteries. Battery life should be months without the backlight, and it even has a low battery warning light. No cord to deal with.

Seems well built, heavy, and doesn’t slide on the desk. Nice price point. Easy to set up. It even has multiple tilt angle (height) options, although I like it flat. TKL is great to minimize the distance to reach the mouse, improving ergonomics.

I went from brown to red switches as that’s all that was in stock, and it was an easy change, although I could tell a slight difference initially.

reviews.title: Quite Loud
reviews.text:
If you can't stand the sound of a clacking keyboard, this isn't for you. It can get quite loud, especially when you're typing fairly quickly. This is probably better for techies who like the intense sound and the tactile key interface. The lighting is also nice. I can recommend this keyboard for those who either live or work alone.

Thanks so much for taking the time to read this review. I hope the information that I've provided helps make your decision a little easier.

reviews.title: A No-Cable Classic For Writers
reviews.text:
I am not lying: This is hands down the best keyboard for writing I have used in the last twenty years. I liked the older acrylic Apple keyboard and I own a mechanical keyboard with click-switches (blue), but this one makes touch typing so much more comfortable.
I wasn’t sure if I would like the tactile keys without click, because I actually like the click. They are just very loud. Logitech’s K845 (with Cherry MX red) is a great keyboard as well, but louder and has a cable.
I wish this keyboard would be backlit though. Black keyboards in front of big screens need some sort of illumination. I got one of these USB LED lights that I plugged behind my monitor, that half-solves the problem by providing some backlight.
Still it’s awesome to write on it. It’s focus is to be a mechanical keyboard. So much that it seems that it skipped the product design. It looks like an OEM-Keyboard from 1995. That’s in a way uncompromisingly functional, but next to a modern flat butterfly keyboard it looks like someone parked an old Volvo next to a Miata.
The quality is good. The keycaps are heavy and lettering sharp. It might be confusing for some that the ‘upper’ characters are printed next to the main set in the same size.
Battery life seems not to be a problem. I am pretty much writing all day, and I’m still on the first set of batteries that came in the package.
PROS AND CONS
+ Precise keyboard for touch-typing
+ Quiet enough for shared work areas
+ Height adjustable
+ Great quality
+ Long Battery life
+ Connects via dongle, not Bluetooth (yes, for me that’s a pro. Bluetooth sucks)
+ Compact with no number pad

- Chunky design
- No backlight
- Very heavy
- Vague keycap lettering
- No number pad (*conflict*)
I can recommend this keyboard to anyone who is typing over a long amount of times. It takes a while to get used to, but once adjusted it’s less tiring than modern butterfly or rubber cap keyboards, because the keys don’t bottom out that easily, and feel better to the fingertips. I took a few photos. I hope it helps to make a decision.

reviews.title: Silent Cherry Red Switches Work Well With Family Room Computer
reviews.text:
While the cherry MX red keys are often used for gaming, I am reviewing this as a typing keyboard in a family room, where the loud clackity clack of a keyboard is unwelcome. And I find this keyboard to be a great solution for such an environment.

This keyboard paired so effortlessly with my Mac that I wasn’t even aware it happened. I checked the keys for their mapping, and found them to be as one would expect for a Windows keyboard—just the usual issue with the non-Apple standard keys near the Shift key.

It is not “full-size,” but 80% size, so it is somewhat smaller, but not so much so that you fee cramped.

They keys are as silent as advertised. And while an old-school touch typist might miss the “click” feedback of a mechanical keyboard, these keys have decent travel, so if you are typing, you will have little doubt that you have actually engaged the key. (I can’t talk to gaming with these.)

I have had no trouble with the bluetooth connection, nor the responsiveness while typing.

If I have any reliability issues, I will be sure to revisit this review as necessary.

title: TECWARE Phantom 87 Key Mechanical Keyboard, RGB led, Outemu Brown Switch
features: RGB BACKLIGHTING - Enhance your gaming experience with 18 pre-set configurations on the mechanical keyboard, or create a unique one to match your setup

OUTEMU SWITCHES - The gaming mechanical keyboard comes with Outemu mechanical switches for precise gaming and comfortable typing. Spare switches + keycap & switch remover tools are provided for easy replacement
FIBERGLASS PCB - Built with SMD LEDs and FR-4 fiberglass printed circuit board, this Tecware mechanical keyboard is able to withstand extended periods of intensive and hardcore gaming sessions

DOUBLE-SHOT KEYCAPS – Featuring an all-new font, the keycaps on this mechanical keyboard are double-shot ABS (dual-injection molding process) which guarantee high resistance against surface wear; markings that cannot be worn off as they are physically part of the keycaps

SPEED ADVANTAGE - With full N-key rollover and 1000Hz pooling rate, Tecware keyboards allow faster and smoother gaming experience. The depression of each key is detected individually, meaning all key presses will be registered, no matter how many keys you press down simultaneously

reviews.title: Great quality
reviews.text: Very bright lights. Click clack noise keys. Small the way I like it. Portable. Works great. Has usb cover cap too.

reviews.title: Excellent keyboard.
reviews.text: This is my first mechanical keyboard and I really love the quality of this keyboard. The LED's are bright and on keyboard LED controls are very useful as you don't have to depend on the software. The keyboard feels very premium and on par with any other expensive keyboard. I would highly recommend this to others looking for new mechanical keyboard.

reviews.title: the smaller one with the browns... i love it
reviews.text: ok the onboard RGB stuff is really why i bought this. Its not Razer RGB but for +/- 50 bucks? oh hell yea. The keys are great, if your used to others it might take a sec to get accustomed, but if you use it your fingers will get to know it real nice :) Solid thru and thru.

reviews.title: Yes
reviews.text: Custom color mapping, might need to buy some more resistant switches for keys near my palms.. or I could learn to type properly. Either way, I approve.

reviews.title: Great colors
reviews.text: Exactly what my son wanted.  Color control is amazing.

title: YMDK 108 104 PBT Double Shot Non Shine Through ANSI OEM Profile KEYCAP for MX Mechanical Keyboard (Only Keycap)(White Gray Mixed)
description:
DetailsThis is only keycap Keyset in package,no keyboard included. The keycap is PBT double shot and legend shine through. Package 1x104 Keycap Keyset which can be used for Standard 104 87 61 keyboard. Compatiability It can be used for most Cherry MX Gateron MX Kailh MX mechanical keyboard. reviews.title: Looks like durgod k320
reviews.text: Awesome caps.  Looks exactly lie durgod k320

reviews.title: Very sturdy product. Was as described
reviews.text: I bought it as a gift for my grandson. Just what he wanted. Working good

reviews.title: Good Keycap Set! Beat Expectations
reviews.text:
I had initially bought this keycap set as a placeholder for my GMK Samurai Keycap set that I was set to receive. However, I had learned that Drop would ship them in late July, and since I was unsure if I was getting a refund, I bought this keycap set as a placeholder.

This keycap set broke all expectations that I held for cheap keycaps. They feel to be of good quality, with a high-ish thock sound that is what I wanted. Overall, it is a good keycap set that I would recommend to people if they are looking for good quality and good-sounding keycaps.

Also, I did get a refund for the GMK keycaps so I will be sticking with these keycaps, although they don't match as they were not meant to pair together and were rather a last-minute decision.

title: DROP + Invyr Holy Panda Mechanical Keyboard Switches - Plate Mounted Tactile Switches, Cherry MX Style, 67g Spring, by Kailh (70 PCS)
features: THE MOST TACTILE SWITCHES IN THE WORLD: With a name like Holy Panda, these switches had to be epic. Made with stems from Halo switches, housing found on Invyr Panda switches, Holy Panda switches combine the best of both worlds.
THE BEST OF BOTH WORLDS: The result is a snappy, tactile switch that is satisfying to type on.

COMPATIBILITY: Holy Panda switches are compatible with plate-mounted Cherry-style PCB's and are perfect for hot-swap compatible barebones kits such as the Drop ALT, CTRL, SHIFT, ENTR, Carina, Planck, and Preonic.
SPECS: Halo Switch Stems, Polycarbonate top housing, Nylon bottom housing, 67g spring, Plate Mount, and MX-compatible.

reviews.title: Excellent tactile
reviews.text:
I have purchased these, lubed Glorious Panda, and Tecsee Purple panda.

This is the best with the other 2 being very close to as good as this. The tactile-ness is a little better than the other both. With the other 2, the tactile is right at the beginning, while this one starts at the beginning and seems to feel the same until bottoming out. All have the nice bump back.

I didn't lube these and they sound and feel great. I think this is my favorite tactile now. But if you're on budget, I would recommend one of the others.

reviews.title: Not a bad one in the bunch
reviews.text: Got the 90 pack and not a broken or bent pin in the entire bunch. Professionally packed and working 100 percent. All switches tested and working fine. A little expensive but worth it for the fast Amazon delivery.

title: Fogruaden Pudding Keycaps 60 Percent, 118 Dye-Sublimation Keycaps Set, ASA Profile Custom Keycaps for Cherry Gateron MX Switches Mechanical Keyboard(Journey)
features: [Pudding Keycaps] Pudding keycaps are specifically designed to amplify the RGB backlighting of keyboards.The lower half of these keycaps are designed to be completely translucent, enabling the backlight of a keyboard to shine through easily, maximize the shine-through of your keyboard’s RGB backlighting.
[Compatibility] This keycaps set has 118 keys, suitable for most 61/68/87/104 ANSI US layouts cherry mx switches keyboards; ideal for custom mechanical keyboards choose

[ASA Profile] This pudding keycap set is designed with ASA profile for those who feel like ergonomic typing experience; it can be worked as the most basic and comfortable set that can improve your typing experience

[Dye-Sublimation Keycaps] The Dye-Sublimation technology made the color has penetrated into the keycap; makes the font of keycaps clear and not easy to fade; maintain the initial state of the keycap for a long time.
[Warm Tips] (Only Keycaps, keyboard for display only); If you find that the keycap is missing, broken, etc, contact with us without hesitation to solve the problem until satisfaction

reviews.title: In Love!
reviews.text: I purchased the "Life is a Journey" ASA profile pudding keycaps because of the awesome theme and color scheme. They are gorgeous, sophisticated, and they FEEL better than any other pudding keycaps I've ever had. No wobble, no cheap plastic sound. They add to the sound of the board and typing experience. Superior to HyperX. I have them paired with my Kailh Box Whites and I couldn't be happier.

title: Akko Pink Keycaps Set, Clear Translucent 155-Key ASA Profile Keys with Mac Keycaps Set for Mechanical Keyboard
features: TRANSPARENT KEYCAPS – Deliver premium and shining RGB experiences with Akko ASA Clear keycap sets! Made by polycarbonate, the keycap is solid and translucent so that your switches and RGB array can shine through. Characters on the ASA Clear keycaps are processed through UV printing with wear-resistant and scratch-resistant tests, and are not easily wiped off.

ULTIMATE CUSTOMIZATION FLEXIBILITY – Comes with Akko ASA profile, the 155-key keycap set is suitable for a variety of layouts including 61-key(60%), 64-key, 68-key (65%), 84-key (75%), 87-key (TKL), 98-Key (Classic 1800), 100-Key (96%), Alice and full 108-key size, and thus offers strong flexibility for keyboard personalization.

MAC KEYCAPS & NOVELTY KEYS – The keycap set is designed for both Windows and Mac users, where Mac modifiers CMD/OPT are offered in different sizes. The transparent keycap set also features extra cute animal themed novelty keys for decoration.

ASA PROFILE – Akko’s proprietary ASA profile is tailored to offer a more familiar and comfortable typing experience by matching the height for OEM profile while maintaining the aesthetics and spheric top of the classic SA profile.

FOR MX STRUCTURE SWITCHES – Compatible with MX structure mechanical switches and mainstream keyboards including but not limited to Cherry, Gateron, Akko and Kailh. Large keys of non-standard layout & stabilizers may not be compatible.

reviews.title: It feels so nice to type!
reviews.text: I really like the feel of the glossy keys. I wish more keycaps came with the gloss feel like these. RBG lights look awesome! I want more!!! :)

reviews.title: It feels so nice to type!
reviews.text: I really like the feel of the glossy keys. I wish more keycaps came with the gloss feel like these. RBG lights look awesome! I want more!!! :)

reviews.title: Impressed
reviews.text: Very good packaging and acceptable quality

reviews.title: Unique keys look cool with RGB. Some drawbacks.
reviews.text:
Pros:
- Beautifully and conveniently packaged and organized. Caps come on three trays with plastic film on them so that nothing will have shifted in transit. It's very easy to replace your caps and keep your old set save and organized in the trays, too. Simple to find any specialized keys that you may need in the trays.
- Print is easy to see and seems durable/high contrast. No funky fonts that are hard to read.
- Looks awesome with RGB.

Cons:

- There are no tactile nubs on the F and J keys to indicate homerow. As a touch typist, this was almost a dealbreaker.
- Color is way off from the images in the description. The images in the description show a clear white color to the keycaps. Along with the "clear/translucent" descriptors, I believed I was going to get more of a white/iced translucent look. Nope. The caps are basically colorless clear. They are smooth and glossy with no texture. I left some of the OG white keys on my keyboard to show the color clearly side by side. Not the look I was expecting from the images and description.

Good to know:

- I've never used ASA profile before, and generally prefer XDA, so these are a little taller than I'm used to on XDA, but more rounded (and, I think, more comfortable, than OEM. I had some lousy stock OEM caps on my old keyboard, and I do feel these caps are an improvement. They are sufficiently dense, and give me a slightly deeper, more muted sound from my keypresses with my brown switches, which I like, compared to the more plasticky/hollow caps that were original to my board.
- Despite having a glossy finish, I don't find these keys to be slippery--the slight curvature leads your fingertips toward the center of the keys easily and they're comfortable to use.
- I really hate that there are no homerow nubs. Who skips that? Come on.

reviews.title: No tactile bumps on F and J, amazing for backlighting
reviews.text:
I have the “White” color option in this set of keycaps from Akko. White is a bit misleading, the color is actually glossy and nearly translucent. This is actually what I wanted, I was looking all over for nearly clear keycaps, but I did want to point that out.

If you like maximum backlighting, this might be the set for you. I was using white pudding caps before, and I thought they let a lot of light shine through. The difference is night and day. These Akko caps show backlighting on all sides and the top of the cap. I’ve included a picture of a white pudding cap surrounded by the clear Akkos to show the difference.

I’m using the keycaps with Akko Vintage White (MX) switches. The keycaps fit well, but they took a bit of force to fit on the switches.

I am disappointed the F and J keys do not have ridges or bumps. I’m a touch typist and using an ergo board with 56 keys, I rely on those ridges to help me orient my hands. This set has so much variety that I wish Akko had included doubles of F and J or even blanks with the ridges.

Speaking of keycap variety: the set has some great 1u options! My current keyboard is an Iris Rev 6, all keys are 1u size. But most keycap sets don’t have 1u keycaps for Shift, Control, Command/Windows, and so on. This set does, which is a big help. I also like the cute animal keycaps, they add some fun to my board.

I believe the ASA height is original to Akko. They have a helpful height chart on their site, comparing ASA to OEM, JDA, OSA, and Cherry. I was using OEM before, and switching to ASA and the glossy feel of the keycaps took about two days of adjustment.

title: YMDK Idobao x ID75 75 Keys Ortholinear Layout VIA Anodized Aluminum Case Plate hot-swappable Hot Swap Type C PCB Mechanical Keyboard Kit (Black)

description:

🧡SWITCH & KEYBOARD COMPATIBILITY-Compatible with any key switch with a cross-shaped switches（“+”） and clones including but not limited to Kaihua, Halo, and Gateron. 115 Keys works with most 61/87/104/108 keyboards.

🧡CHERRY PROFILE - Ergonomics design for long time use without fatigue at work or in-game. Cherry profile is lower than OEM/SA and higher than XDA/DAS. This kit is suitable for most people and is recommended for newcomers.

🧡A DECENT GIFT - For esports enthusiast, white-collar worker, student, children, anyone who pursue a unique keyboard with your characteristic. This set of keycaps will be a perfect gift for you to make your keyboard dynamic or comfortable.

🧡WARM TIMPS-Keycaps only, the keyboard in the picture is only for the demo and is not for sale. ANSI, US layout. This set cannot be used for 64/68/75/84/96 layout which need special keys such as “Shift”，“Alt” etc.

reviews.title: Great Keycaps for the price!!
reviews.text: When these keycaps came in I wasn't expecting a whole lot because of the price but surprisingly they're actually pretty nice. Usually on cheaper sets like this the legending and print quality can vary quite a bit but these keycaps were really consistent and is on par with some other sets I've had that cost twice as much so that was nice to see. Overall they're pretty great for the price and I honestly recommend them if you if you're looking for "designer" style keycaps.

reviews.title: Beautiful keycaps for designers!
reviews.text: These keycaps are beautiful! I use photoshop often so I already have the shortcuts memorized but having these keycaps are just so nice regardless. They feel really nice and thick, the printing on them is nice and clear, and I love the color way for them. I dont use this board often even when working in photoshop and really just use this board and keycap set as a decorative piece to add to my collection of keyboards. I love these keycaps!!

title: NACODEX 132 Keys Gradient Blue PBT Keycaps Set, Cherry Profile Lake Blue Summer Keycap for 61/87/ 104/108 Mechanical Keyboard, Compatible with Cherry/Gateron/Otemu/Kailh Switch
features: 【Blue Gradient Keycaps】The keycap set gradually changes from blue to white, inspired by "East Dawning". At dawn, when the sun in the east exceeds the horizon, the blue sky gradually reveals white dawn (it's dawn), which means opening a new day. A day that brings hope and confidence to your life.

【132 Custom Keycaps Set】Blue Gradient Keycaps besides the basic full keycaps, this set also contains extra replacement keycaps. It provides more fun to match keyboards with different layouts, no matter your keyboard is 60%, 65%, 75%, TKL, 100% or 108 key mechanical keyboard, adding color to your desktop, it is the perfect keycap replacement on the market.

【Comfortable Cherry Profile】Adopt the popular cherry profile on the market, the height is 2mm lower than the OEM keycap, suitable for those who like ergonomic comfortable height typing experience, if you are looking for something that can improve your gaming experience, don’t spend milliseconds come find your next key, just set this Cherry Profile PBT keycap for efficient and comfortable keys.

【PBT Keycaps with High-Quality Material】Pbt double shot keycaps adopts two-color injection molding technology and PBT material. Compared with ordinary ABS keycaps, it feels more delicate and comfortable. It is very dry and not easy to oil, not like ABS. Simplified closed characters, high hardness, never fade.

【Strong compatibility with MX Switches】132 blue keycap set in the exquisite box, it only has keycaps, not including the keyboard, it is compatible with MX structure switches, such as Cherry, Gateron, Kailh, TTC, etc., you can easily and quickly DIY your mechanical keyboard becomes the ideal and best choice when you are looking for a replacement set.

reviews.title: Just what I was looking for
reviews.text: Great quality, love that it comes with multiple different colors of the same key so that you can customize it. So happy with this purchase!!!

reviews.title: Good feeling, good overall design
reviews.text: Was able to use these keys on my gaming keyboard.  It provided a good feeling as I press on the keys.  It’s Very responsive.  The only downside to this is that the rgb lights on my keyboard does not pass through the keys…not the end of the world but overall a good set of keys.  The picture on the website is deceiving as it’s just keys to replace an existing keyboard.  It does not come with the keyboard itself.

reviews.title: You Like Red, White & Blue So Make Your Keyboard Reflect That!
reviews.text: We started doing this with our “high-end” computer buyers. We take a premium – Cherry or similar – keyboard and remove all or most of the key tops replacing them with the various colors available making a color complementary computer input device. It makes for a more interesting keyboard, which obviously is the main interface with your computer, and it gives our customers something so unique as to be one-of-a-kind. All the keyboards start with premium red, blue, brown, or black key actuators which, without exception, are the best available. That together with our customer’s keytops “artwork” gives a person something exclusive as well as offering superior functionality. The keytops come right off use the small plastic tool most of the keytop provides include with their kits and doing a whole keyboard only takes about 20 minutes. One thing you do have to watch for is the keytop height. Many times, they will make certain keys a little higher. This poses no issue unless you stick a high key in the middle of the number/letters, then this may impede faster typists. Remember each key actuator that is attached to the base of the keyboard is programmed to send a certain signal to the computer thus causing your monitor to display that letter/number or take that action. For example, if you put the “M” keytop where the “T” was that will still send a “T” to your computer and monitor. I would recommend removing and replacing 2 or 3 at a time or having a like keyboard to refer to, so the possibility for confusion is limited. All keyboards don’t have the exact layout especially in the extended section and number pad. Also, some of the higher end gaming style keyboards have extra programmable keys that are specified through the keyboard manufacturer’s software. Some of the keytop set will provide blank keys to use in these instances. Buy a couple sets and have fun making your own custom keyboard.

reviews.title: Great color for white keyboard, good quality
reviews.text: The NACODEX 129 Keys PBT Keycaps Set is a high-quality and visually appealing upgrade for any mechanical keyboard. The keycaps are made of durable PBT material and feature a JSA profile and double shot design. The pink and white color combination gives a unique touch to the keyboard, making it a great choice for those who want to personalize their setup. The keycaps are compatible with Cherry, Gateron, Otemu, and Kailh switches, making them a versatile choice for many different types of mechanical keyboards. Overall, this keycap set is a great investment for anyone looking to improve the look and feel of their keyboard.

reviews.title: Solid
reviews.text: This keyboard and mouse set is solid.  They have a durable aluminum body.  The keys are mechanical in look, but press easy without any noise.  The colors are nice and shine through the keys so you can see which letter it is in the dark.  It gives off just the right amount of light.  They look slick together on a desk and operate well.  Great little set.

reviews.title: Nice keyboard!!
reviews.text:
Updated review.. The mouse quit working after about 12 hours of use. This is disappointing because when it worked it was nice and responsive and was comfortable. When I left the original review everything worked fine..

This keyboard looks and works good. The back lighting makes it easy to see in the dark and the keys are precise and feel good while typing. The real aluminum frame is sturdy and looks good too. The phone holder is a nice touch. I would say it's worth it for the price.

title: CUSTOMIZATIONS Coiled USB c Cable, Customized Gaming Mechanical Keyboard Cable, Handwork Braided + PET mesh, Metal Plug, with Detachable Metal Aviator Connector (Black White)
features: [Multiple color options] CUSTOMIZATIONS coiled keyboard cable has various eye-catching color settings, which can provide more interesting elements for your desktop settings.

[keyboard Coiled cables, durable quality]: This custom coiled cable uses four high-quality copper wires and aluminum shielding foil as the core. The material is not afraid of bending or breaking. The weaving adopts woven mesh + PET mesh double-layer weaving, and the resin mesh is both beautiful and durable.

[Metal aviator connector]: The metal cannon connector allows you to quickly connect different cables to the keyboard or other accessories. The pure copper is chrome-plated, the copper needle and the copper core are plated with 24K gold wire, and the shell adopts electroplating technology to achieve a bright texture, highlighting high-end and texture.

[Coiled USB C Cable, USB 2.0 compatible] The cable adopts Type-C interface design, aluminum alloy CNC shell, sandblasted surface, corrosion and oxidation resistance, and recessed design can match most keyboards.

[Excellent quality]: This Coiled Cable has experienced multiple technical tests, including data transmission stability, Cable is firm and durable, and the joint welding is firm. Each product you have got is high quality.

reviews.title: Works great
